title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 105.685 - Effective date of changes
text:
105.685.  Effective date of changes. — A substantial proposed change in plan benefits shall not become effective until such time as the provisions of sections 105.660 to 105.685 are complied with.
(L. 1979 H.B. 130 § 6) 
Effective 8-06-79
